title: HubSpot vs Mailgun (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: HubSpot vs Mailgun: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between HubSpot and Mailgun comes down to your specific use case. HubSpot is built for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform, while Mailgun targets developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

comparison_table.tool_a: Businesses That Want Email And Crm In One Platform
comparison_table.tool_b: Developers Sending Transactional And Bulk Email Via Api

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on businesses that want email and CRM in one platform
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers sending transactional and bulk email via API

faq.a: It depends on your use case. HubSpot wins for businesses that want email and CRM in one platform, while Mailgun is stronger for developers sending transactional and bulk email via API.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, HubSpot or Mailgun?
faq.a: HubSpot starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Mailgun to HubSpot?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
